projectDescription: A free music streaming app for iOS and Android that plays songs and videos via YouTube, with favorites, offline support, and a full-featured player.
keyFeatures: Stream music and music videos sourced from YouTube without a premium subscription
Full-featured player with play/pause, next/previous, shuffle, repeat, and sleep timer
Offline playback for favorited songs downloaded to device storage
Home screen with recently played tracks and favorite artists with recommendations
Search by song, artist, or music genre with in-memory caching for fast results
Lock screen and background playback with media controls via expo-media-control
Dockerized Node.js backend using yt-dlp and FFmpeg for audio/video extraction
Multi-language support via a built-in LanguageContext
